=============

SOC 2 Mapping

=============




FlareInspect maps findings to SOC 2 Trust Services Criteria.



Usage


----


.. code-block:: bash


    flareinspect assess --token $TOKEN --compliance soc2




Control Mapping


----


.. rubric:: Common Criteria



===============  

   SOC 2 Control    Check IDs

===============  

   CC6.1            CFL-ACC-001, CFL-ACC-002, CFL-ACC-003, CFL-ACC-005, CFL-SSL-001, CFL-WAF-001/002/004/005, CFL-ZT-001/002/005, CFL-API-001/002, CFL-BOT-001, CFL-PAGE-001/002, CFL-EMAIL-001/002/003, CFL-DLP-001, CFL-PAGESHIELD-001, CFL-SNIPPET-001, CFL-CFRULE-001, CFL-TXRULE-001, CFL-INSIGHT-001/004, CFL-DEVICE-001

   CC6.2            CFL-ACC-003, CFL-ZT-002, CFL-DEVICE-001

   CC6.3            CFL-ZT-002, CFL-DEVICE-001

   CC6.6            CFL-DNS-002/003/005, CFL-WAF-002/003, CFL-ZT-004/006, CFL-WORK-002, CFL-INSIGHT-005, CFL-TUNNEL-001, CFL-GW-001

   CC6.7            CFL-SSL-001/003/004/005, CFL-MTLS-001/002, CFL-CH-001, CFL-ORIGCERT-001, CFL-AIGW-001, CFL-INSIGHT-004

   CC7.1            CFL-SEC-001/002, CFL-ASM-001/002, CFL-INSIGHT-001/002/004

   CC7.2            CFL-ACC-004, CFL-LOG-001, CFL-ASM-001, CFL-INSIGHT-003

   CC8.1            CFL-WORK-001, CFL-SNIPPET-001

===============  

SOC 2 criteria map to controls across account, DNS, SSL, WAF, Zero Trust,

Workers, and Security Center categories.
